authors.author: Daniel Gardner
Daniel Gardner
In dir ist mein Leben (in dir meine Stärke)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I meet with You and my soul sings out As your word throws doubt far away I sing to You and my heart cries "Holy! Hallelujah, Father, You're near!"

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My hope is in You, Lord All the day long, I won't be shaken by drought or storm A peace that passes understanding is my song And I sing my hope is in You, Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I wait for You and my soul finds rest In my selfishness, You show me grace I worship You and my heart cries "Glory Hallelujah, Father, You're here!"

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My hope is in You, Lord All the day long I won't be shaken by drought or storm A peace that passes understanding is my song And I sing my hope is in You, Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will wait on You You are my refuge I will wait on You You are my refuge

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: My hope is in You, Lord, all the day long I won't be shaken by drought or storm My hope is in You, Lord All the day long I won't be shaken by drought or storm

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: A peace that passes understanding is my song And I sing my hope is in You, Lord My hope is in You, Lord, yeah My hope is in You, Lord
